full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #24 (2026-05-07)

PULSE
Health: 0.4416 (C). 910 wallets, 169 contributors. 9 memos today vs 126 avg. Velocity dropping.

FLOW
39 reward payments, 284117 PFT distributed to 21 contributors. Top earner: rs5gTo...VF97 (69285 PFT).

AIRDROPS
2 daily airdrops issued yesterday totaling 17,200 PFT. Highest: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (9,200 PFT). Lowest: r4ahFv...5XyU (8,000 PFT). 7-day leader: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (75,600 PFT, avg 9,450/day over 7 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): r4RPpe...WghS (51 memos). 14 new wallet(s) this week. 31 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
743 sybil accounts tracked across 1 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 80.5%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-04-07): 7636 transactions from 94 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA
